overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete may be void under B&P Code 16600
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisee may be free to compete immediately post-term

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration venue in FL may not be enforceable in CA
overrides.why_it_matters: Disputes may need to be resolved in CA, not FL

overrides.override_summary: FL choice of law may not apply; CA Franchise Investment Law and Relations Act govern
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchise law provides stronger franchisee protections

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes CA Franchise Investment Law claims; waiver of rights under franchise law is void
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be required to release CA statutory claims on renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Punitive damages waiver provision not enforceable under CA Corp Code 31512
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisee retains right to seek punitive damages

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs the franchise agreement
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchise law applies instead of FL law

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside Illinois is void for litigation (arbitration outside IL still permitted)
overrides.why_it_matters: Litigation must be in IL; arbitration may still be in FL

overrides.override_summary: Forum selection not enforceable under Indiana franchise laws
overrides.why_it_matters: Disputes can be resolved in IN

overrides.override_summary: Indiana franchise laws apply to noncompete notwithstanding FL choice of law
overrides.why_it_matters: IN law may limit noncompete enforceability

overrides.override_summary: General release excludes claims under Indiana Deceptive Franchise Practice Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be required to release IN statutory claims

overrides.override_summary: Choice of forum not applicable to MD Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchise law claims can be brought in MD

overrides.override_summary: Choice of non-MD law not applicable for MD Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MD law governs franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: General release does not apply to MD Franchise Law liability
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be required to release MD statutory claims

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration or litigation outside Michigan is void
overrides.why_it_matters: All disputes must be resolved in MI

overrides.override_summary: Termination requires good cause; franchisee must receive 30-day written notice and cure opportunity
overrides.why_it_matters: Stronger termination protections than base agreement

overrides.override_summary: Must fairly compensate franchisee on non-renewal by repurchase or FMV
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee entitled to compensation for inventory/equipment/fixtures on non-renewal (if term <5 yrs and noncompete applies)

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse transfer except for good cause
overrides.why_it_matters: Transfer consent cannot be unreasonably withheld

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require litigation outside MN; no jury trial waiver; no liquidated damages; no consent to injunctive relief
overrides.why_it_matters: Comprehensive procedural protections for MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination with 60 days to cure; 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Much longer notice/cure periods than base agreement

overrides.override_summary: General release prohibited (MN Rules 2860.4400D). Exhibit G-4 not required.
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisee need not sign general release at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: NY General Business Law rights preserved; non-waiver provisions of GBL 687(4) and 687(5) satisfied
overrides.why_it_matters: NY statutory rights cannot be waived via release

overrides.override_summary: Requirement to sign general release on renewal is deleted
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisee not required to sign release on renewal

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside RI void for claims under RI Franchise Investment Act
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchise law claims must be brought in RI

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete generally unenforceable under SD law
overrides.why_it_matters: SD franchisee likely free to compete post-term

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside SD void for claims enforceable in SD
overrides.why_it_matters: SD franchise law claims must be brought in SD

overrides.override_summary: Unlawful to cancel franchise without reasonable cause under VA Retail Franchising Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Provides additional termination protections

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation in WA or mutually agreed location; litigation can be brought in WA
overrides.why_it_matters: Disputes can be resolved in WA, not FL

overrides.override_summary: Release void unless negotiated post-agreement with independent counsel
overrides.why_it_matters: Standard pre-printed release at renewal/transfer is unenforceable

overrides.override_summary: Void unless employee earns $100K+/yr (adjusted for inflation); independent contractor $250K+/yr
overrides.why_it_matters: Most franchise employees would be below threshold, making noncompete unenforceable

overrides.override_summary: No-poach provisions void. Prior AOD with WA AG (2019) re: no-poach provisions.
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee may freely recruit from other PTP franchisees

overrides.override_summary: WI Fair Dealership Law affects termination and non-renewal conditions
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional protections under WI dealership law
